chapter_title.en: The Prayer of Fear, Pursuit, Encounter, and Competition

text: 1343 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «اَلَّذِي يَخَافُ اَللُّصُوصَ يُصَلِّي إِيمَاءً عَلَى دَابَّتِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1343 - In the narration from Zurarah from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"One who fears robbers should perform their prayer by gesturing while on their mount”.
